prompt: Write the opening of the community page — the first thing a new member reads.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
Wiring constraints, not prose:

- Source of truth: i18n/CMS key `community.home.opening` — not hardcoded in multiple components.
- `OpeningHero` component with title/body/cta props; empty & error fallbacks.
- Max character constraints for mobile; safe truncate if CMS overflows.
- Optional variant field later; single string in v1.

Out of scope for Builder: authoring the brand story.
